summary: Iteration 26 backend + frontend verified. Backend pytest 7/7 passed (100%): (1) GET /api/sports/livescores → 200 {matches:[]}; (2) GET /api/sports/upcoming → 200 with 212 real matches from RapidAPI; (3) GET /api/sports/leagues → 200 (returns dict {popular:[...]} — see minor); (4) GET /api/free-bet/status → 200 with can_claim/hours_left/amount=0.80; (5) POST /api/free-bet/claim first call → 200 {ok:true, amount:0.80, balance +0.80} verified via /api/client/balance; (6) second /free-bet/claim → 429; (7) GET /api/spin/status → cooldown_days:14, min_deposit:100.0, prizes:[0.1,0.25,0.5,1.0,2.0,3.0,5.0]; POST /api/spin/spin behavior branches on eligibility (testbugfix1 was eligible with deposits ≥ $100 in this run — returned 429 due to prior recent spin, still HTTP-legal). Frontend: nav-sports visible in top nav, sports-view + sports-tab-live + sports-tab-upcoming render; clicking Upcoming rendered sports-list-upcoming with 100 match rows (Vietnam vs Myanmar, Nashville SC vs Atlanta United, LA Galaxy vs LAFC, …); dashboard-footer text = '© 2026 BetterSocial · Development by BK & CEO Sinester' (contains 'BK' and 'Sinester'); Games view now renders only the Stairs game — no games-tab-aviator, no games-tab-stairs tab bar, no 'Aviator' text on the page. The topbar-freebet-btn was not visible during the UI test because the backend pytest had already consumed today's claim minutes earlier (expected — the button hides after claim).

minor.issue: `leagues` key returns a dict `{popular:[...]}` instead of a list because the code does `data.get('response') or data.get('leagues') or data` and RapidAPI wraps its response under `response.popular`. Frontend does not currently consume /leagues so this is cosmetic, but the shape is inconsistent with /livescores and /upcoming. Fix: `return {"leagues": (data.get('response') or {}).get('popular') or []}`.

action_items: Optional: normalise /api/sports/leagues response shape so `leagues` is always a list (unwrap `response.popular`).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 5790 lines and growing — sports, spin, free-bet, slot, tips are all inline in the main file. Overdue split into dedicated routers/modules.
SPORTS_RAPID_KEY has a hardcoded fallback value in server.py — should live only in .env; hard-coded API keys in source are a security smell.
/api/sports/leagues data-shape inconsistency (dict vs list) — see minor backend issue above.

Sports endpoints have no server-side caching; every hit calls RapidAPI (10s timeout). Under load this will hit the free-tier quota fast. Add short in-process TTL cache (60s live, 300s upcoming, 3600s leagues).
test_credentials: testbugfix1/password1 works. Owner Balkin/Dennis123.@@ works. Admin secret haha123 works.
seed_data_creation: The free-bet claim test consumed testbugfix1's daily $0.80 claim; the spin_status test noted a prior spin record (429 on new spin) — no other state changed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iter26_sports_freebet_spin.py — run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest`. To test the Free-Bet frontend button visibility in the future you MUST first purge db.free_bets for that user (or wait 24h), otherwise the pytest claim will have consumed the day's credit and the UI button will already be hidden. Sports endpoints depend on external RapidAPI — treat empty matches + `error:sports_source_unavailable` as acceptable. testbugfix1 currently has lifetime deposits ≥ $100 and is spin-eligible but on cooldown. Frontend token is stored in localStorage as `bs_user_token`; login route /client/login only shows the form on the initial landing (SignIn button), the /client route auto-loads dashboard once bs_user_token is set — inject it directly for tests.
